judge_reason: Both descriptions agree on a main color illustration of a blue planet with smaller celestial bodies against a starry background, but disagree on the caption text ('Alien Co' vs 'UFO pictured over Costa Rica') and the presence/type of a secondary visual element (B shows a landscape photo, A shows a circular inset photo).
original_image_tags: A large artistic illustration of a planetary system in deep space. A large blue planet is visible in the upper left, with several smaller red and brown planets orbiting in the distance against a starry background with a nebula-like blue mist. Below and to the left is a circular inset photograph in black and white showing a bright, disc-shaped object hovering over a dark landscape, captioned "UFO pictured over Costa Rica".
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A newspaper page with a large color illustration of a star field and several planets or spherical bodies, headed “Alien Co,” plus a smaller circular grayscale inset image of a cratered surface with a small circled object.*
